The [[Tagge Mining Company|House of Tagge Mining Company]] '''AEA-500 mineral extractor''' was produced during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Characteristics==
Twenty [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long, it carried one [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], one dig operator, and was equipped with [[tri-beam laser]]s, which were used for [[Mining/Legends|mining]]. The craft could carry ten metric tons of ore and minerals that were gathered from [[Planetoid/Legends|planetoids]].

{{Veh-stub}}
